2.content:
Gagan Kumar Pasupuleti

Technology Analyst / Trainer / Free Lancer

+91-8897965714 | gaganpasupuleti@gmail.com | Hyderabad, INDIA | Experience: 6+ Yrs

Profile summary

I am a Data Analytics and Data Science Trainer with 6+ years of industry experience, along with proven expertise as a
freelance remote developer for offshore clients. I specialize in transforming beginners into job -ready professionals
through hands-on, real-world training. Additionally, I excel in rapid application development, delivering production-
ready websites and applications within 15 days. My approach combines project -based learning, industry-standard
tools, and career-focused mentoring.
Core Expertise

•  Python Programming & Backend Development

•  Data Science & Machine Learning

•  SQL, Data Analytics & Data Modeling

•  Power BI, Tableau & Data Visualization

•  ETL Processes & Data Pipeline Development

Training Experience

36  Months

•  Resume Building, ATS Optimization & Interview Preparation

•  Delivered structured training programs in Python, Data Science, SQL, and Power BI with a strong focus on real-world

applications.

•  Mentored 100+ students through hands-on project development, enabling practical learning and skill enhancement.
•  Conducted intensive bootcamps (2–3 months) designed to build industry-ready skills.
•  Designed and implemented industry-relevant curricula aligned with current job market requirements.
•  Provided end-to-end career mentorship, including mock interviews, resume building, and ATS optimization.

Workshops & Seminars

3-Day Data Science Workshop
• Covered Python fundamentals, data analysis, data visualization, and machine learning basics with hands-on practice.
Power BI & Tableau Workshop (2 Days)
• Focused on dashboard development, KPI tracking, and deriving business insights using real-world datasets.
Python Bootcamp (7 days)
• Delivered end-to-end training from fundamentals to advanced topics, including APIs and automation.
DevOps & Cloud Awareness Sessions
• Introduced core concepts of CI/CD, Docker, and cloud fundamentals aligned with industry practices.

 Freelance & Independent Training

•  Delivered personalized training programs for students and professionals, aligned with individual career goals and skill levels.
•  Designed structured learning roadmaps for Data Analyst and Developer roles based on current industry demands.
•  Provided hands-on, project-based training using real-world datasets and use cases to ensure practical skill development.

Student Projects Delivered

• Netflix Traffic Analysis
• Bitcoin Price Prediction
• Crime Rate Analysis in India
• Resume ATS Scoring System
• Telecom Data Analytics Platform
• Sales Forecasting System
• Customer Churn Prediction Model
• E-commerce Recommendation System
• Stock Market Trend Analysis
• Fraud Detection System
• Sentiment Analysis on Social Media
• Employee Performance Analytics Dashboard
• Loan Approval Prediction System
• Healthcare Data Analysis Dashboard
• Weather Forecast Prediction Model
• Student Performance Prediction System
• Retail Sales Analytics Dashboard
• Supply Chain Optimization Analysis
• Energy Consumption Prediction Model
• Movie Recommendation System
• IPL Data Analysis Dashboard
• Financial Risk Analysis System
• Web Traffic Analytics Dashboard
• Credit Card Fraud Detection Model

5.content:
9392571517

 jyothirmaimalempati2004@gmail.com

 https://www.linkedin.com/in/malempati-jyothirmai

JYOTHIRMAI  MALEMPATI

Career Objective
Seeking an opportunity in a dynamic organization to apply my academic knowledge, enhance my skills, and contribute
effectively. Eager to collaborate, grow professionally, and make a meaningful impact.

Education
Sri Mittapali collage of Engineering                                                                                        November  2021  –  April  2025
B. Tech in Computer Science Engineering-Artificial Intelligence                                                                          CGPA:8.5

Technical  Skills
Programming Languages: Python            Databases:  SQL                     Data Visualization tools: Power BI, Excel
Technologies: Artificial Intelligence, Machine learning - Supervised learning and unsupervised learning
Libraries: Pandas, NumPy

Experience
Internship Studio                                                                                                                            July  2024  –  Aug 2024
Data  Analytics  Intern

• Enhanced 15+ datasets, reducing data inconsistencies by 25% through advanced preprocessing using Pandas

and NumPy.

• Designed  interactive  data  visualizations  Dashboards Using Power BI (Power Quary, Power Pivot) Which leads Data

to actionable  insights  and  improved client decisions by 15%.

Data valley                                                                                                                                                          Jan 2025- Present
AI Driven Data Analytics Intern
Present learning about Advanced Data Analytics from basics of python to power BI. From Analyzing Data to Building
Dashboards with Client Requirements
Projects
Human  Behavior  Analysis  using  Machine  learning|  Machine learning  (Team  Lead)

• In this project For Data Generation, we have used advanced Library called Faker
• The Machine learning Algorithm which we have used is Random Forest, For Preprocessing we have used Pandas,

NumPy And data Visualization library Matplotlib.

• Project Objective: Analyze human behavior and decision patterns using machine learning And focusing on behavior

tracking in social media platforms and e-commerce interactions.

Captcha Generator | Python

• Generates image and text-based CAPTCHA for user verification.
• Users enter the CAPTCHA text and submit to check correctness
• Achieved 85% accuracy in generating text-based CAPTCHA And Provides an option to refresh and generate a

new CAPTCHA if the existing one is unclear.

Achievements
Attended to National Conference on Mathematics, Statistics and Data Analysis using R. The conference is about
presenting a paper on A Deep Learning Approach for Face Reorganization. The team size is 3. I am the team leader. The
main aim is Detecting a face from numerous faces. At Achariya Nagarjuna University.
Certifications

• Python101ForDataScience, SQL And Relational Databases (IBM)
• Programming Fundamentals Using Python (Infosys Springboard)
• Data Analytics and Visualization (Accenture)
